justification: All pass criteria met: contradiction explicitly named with both Bird's invariant (courier MUST be assigned BEFORE IN_TRANSIT) and MJ's design (IN_TRANSIT WITHOUT courier, background job within 30s) precisely paraphrased. Escalation is structured as a contradiction routed upward (not to Shaq). The core question — hard precondition vs soft requirement — is clearly framed. Three concrete resolution options provided. No position is silently adopted; the recommendation explicitly states both agents must agree. Shaq is not involved in resolution.

observations.text: Contradiction description is precise and names the exact conflict: invariant at moment of transition vs temporary violation for latency
Three well-differentiated resolution options covering enforce, relax, and compromise paths
Option C demonstrates genuine synthesis rather than splitting the difference — it preserves both agents' core concerns
Recommendation explicitly defers to both Bird and MJ for validation rather than picking a winner
Low confidence areas are well-calibrated — correctly uncertain about resolution choice while confident the contradiction is real
Assumptions section makes implicit interpretations explicit, which aids the resolution decision
